name: io.github.gsc-em/aio-agents-mcp
title: AIO Agents MCP
description: Demand-side procurement attribution MCP for retail grocery. 2,235 banners across 28 EU + LatAm markets, attributed to ERP, procurement platform, and cloud. Operated by GreenCore Solutions Corp. Companion to io.github.gsc-em/a2a-mcp-cpg (supply-side catalog).
